CREATE TABLE numbers (a FLOAT, b FLOAT);
SELECT a, b, multiply(a, b) AS product FROM numbers WHERE a > -1;
SELECT a, b, multiply(a, b) AS product FROM numbers WHERE b IS NOT NULL;
SELECT a, b, multiply(a, b) AS product FROM numbers WHERE a IS NULL OR b IS NULL;
SELECT a, b, multiply(a, b) AS product FROM numbers WHERE multiply(a, b) > 0;
SELECT multiply(a, b) FROM (SELECT a, b FROM numbers WHERE a > 0) AS positive_numbers;
SELECT a, b, (SELECT multiply(a, b) FROM numbers) AS product FROM numbers AS n;
SELECT n.a, n.b, t.product FROM numbers AS n INNER JOIN (SELECT multiply(a, b) AS product FROM numbers) AS t ON n.a = 0;
SELECT multiply((SELECT a FROM numbers WHERE b = 1.0), (SELECT b FROM numbers WHERE a = 1.0));
